prompt: A realistic close-up photograph of a person holding a tiny handcrafted miniature dollhouse in both hands. The miniature is highly detailed and fully assembled, showing tiny furniture, shelves, books, plants, lamps, rugs, stairs, miniature kitchen tools, wall art, cozy room decorations. The scale should feel very small compared to the hands, emphasizing the miniature size. Natural lighting, soft shadows, realistic skin texture on the hands, shallow depth of field, photorealistic, highly detailed, real physical object.
